interaction_phrase: D-Wave Systems Inc., the leader in quantum computing systems, software, and services
occurrence_sentence: D-Wave Systems Inc., the leader in quantum computing systems, software, and services, today announced the immediate availability of Leap 2, the first quantum cloud service designed for developers and organizations to easily build and deploy real-world hybrid quantum applications with practical impact.

"Developers and enterprise leaders need the tools and support to turn their ideas and innovations into quantum applications that have a real impact on their business. You can't capture new revenue or solve the most difficult problems facing your industry if you don't have the ability to quickly ideate, build, and deploy quantum applications." said Alan Baratz, CEO of D-Wave.

interaction_phrase: D-Wave's systems are being used by ... NEC
occurrence_sentence: D-Wave's systems are being used by some of the world's most advanced organizations, including NEC, Volkswagen, DENSO, Lockheed Martin, USRA, USC, Los Alamos National Laboratory, and Oak Ridge National Laboratory.

D-Wave's systems are being used by some of the world's most advanced organizations, including NEC, Volkswagen, DENSO, Lockheed Martin, USRA, USC, Los Alamos National Laboratory, and Oak Ridge National Laboratory.
